sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55185" key="kataskuqrwpa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατασκυθρωπ-άω</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατασκυθρωπ-έω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., c. gen., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
